title: BigBear.ai [NASDAQ: BBAI] Director Sells Over $61,000 in Shares as Q1 Results Disappoint, 27% Stock Price Decline
text: BigBear.ai director sold over $61,000 in shares as Q1 results disappointed investors, contributing to a 27% stock price decline. The director's sale, combined with mixed earnings (revenue beat but EPS miss), triggered a negative market reaction. However, the company's strong backlog growth and contract wins provide some offset to the profitability concerns that weighed on the stock following the announcement.
